data._mktxp.conf:
[MKTXP]
    listen = '0.0.0.0:49090'
    socket_timeout = 5

    initial_delay_on_failure = 120
    max_delay_on_failure = 900
    delay_inc_div = 5

    bandwidth = False
    bandwidth_test_dns_server = 8.8.8.8
    bandwidth_test_interval = 600
    minimal_collect_interval = 5

    verbose_mode = False

    fetch_routers_in_parallel = False
    max_worker_threads = 5
    max_scrape_duration = 30
    total_max_scrape_duration = 90

    persistent_router_connection_pool = True
    persistent_dhcp_cache = True
    compact_default_conf_values = False
    prometheus_headers_deduplication = False
data.mktxp.conf:
[MikrotikRouter]
    enabled = True
    hostname = 192.168.1.1
    # Username/password are supplied out-of-band via a manually-created Secret,
    # mounted at /etc/mktxp/credentials.yaml (see README.md). Keeps the router
    # password out of Git.
    credentials_file = /etc/mktxp/credentials.yaml

    use_ssl = False
    plaintext_login = True          # set False only for RouterOS < 6.43

    health = True
    installed_packages = True
    dhcp = True
    dhcp_lease = True

    connections = True
    interface = True
    route = True
    pool = True
    firewall = True
    neighbor = True

    poe = False                     # router model has no PoE ("no such command prefix")
    monitor = True
    netwatch = True
    public_ip = True
    wireless = True
    wireless_clients = True
    capsman = True
    capsman_clients = True

    user = True
    queue = True

    custom_labels = site:home
